name: recently_added
description: Recently Added view for Volumio's local music library — uses MPD's built-in modified-since query
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Adds a 'Recently Added' entry to the Browse menu showing albums added to your library within configurable time windows. Reads directly from MPD's database — no separate index, no watcher, no native modules.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.4.4: docs only — README install instructions updated to recommend 'volumio plugin install' (which uses Volumio's plugin manager directly, no manual file copying or reboot needed). Manual install kept as a fallback section for older Volumio versions where the CLI may not work. v0.4.3: inline play and add-to-queue buttons on time-window and artist-drill-down rows now work.
